generalFeats.name: Alertness
generalFeats.description: You get a +2 bonus on Perception and Sense Motive skill checks.

generalFeats.name: Athletic
generalFeats.description: You get a +2 bonus on Climb and Swim skill checks.

generalFeats.name: Blind-Fight
generalFeats.description: In melee, every time you miss because of concealment, you can reroll your miss chance percentile roll one time to see if you actually hit.

generalFeats.name: Combat Reflexes
generalFeats.description: You may make a number of additional attacks of opportunity per round equal to your Dexterity bonus.

generalFeats.name: Deceitful
generalFeats.description: You get a +2 bonus on Bluff and Disguise skill checks.

generalFeats.name: Deft Hands
generalFeats.description: You get a +2 bonus on Disable Device and Sleight of Hand skill checks.

generalFeats.name: Dodge
generalFeats.description: You gain a +1 dodge bonus to your AC against attacks made by one opponent that you designate during your action.

generalFeats.name: Endurance
generalFeats.description: You gain a +4 bonus on checks and saves to resist nonlethal damage from forced marches, starvation, thirst, and hot or cold environments.

generalFeats.name: Great Fortitude
generalFeats.description: You get a +2 bonus on all Fortitude saving throws.

generalFeats.name: Improved Initiative
generalFeats.description: You get a +4 bonus on initiative checks.

generalFeats.name: Improved Unarmed Strike
generalFeats.description: You are considered to be armed even when unarmed and can deal lethal damage with unarmed strikes.

generalFeats.name: Investigator
generalFeats.description: You get a +2 bonus on Appraise and Linguistics skill checks.

generalFeats.name: Iron Will
generalFeats.description: You get a +2 bonus on all Will saving throws.

generalFeats.name: Lightning Reflexes
generalFeats.description: You get a +2 bonus on all Reflex saving throws.

generalFeats.name: Magical Aptitude
generalFeats.description: You get a +2 bonus on Spellcraft and Use Magic Device skill checks.

generalFeats.name: Nimble Moves
generalFeats.description: You can move through 5 feet of difficult terrain each round as if it were normal terrain.

generalFeats.name: Persuasive
generalFeats.description: You get a +2 bonus on Diplomacy and Intimidate skill checks.

generalFeats.name: Point-Blank Shot
generalFeats.description: You get a +1 bonus on attack and damage rolls with ranged weapons at ranges of up to 30 feet.

generalFeats.name: Power Attack
generalFeats.description: On your action, before making attack rolls for a turn, you may choose to subtract a number from all melee attack rolls and add twice that number to all melee damage rolls.

generalFeats.name: Precise Shot
generalFeats.description: You can shoot or throw ranged weapons at an opponent engaged in melee without taking the standard –4 penalty on your attack roll.

generalFeats.name: Self-Sufficient
generalFeats.description: You get a +2 bonus on Heal and Survival skill checks.

generalFeats.name: Skill Focus
generalFeats.description: You get a +3 bonus on all checks involving the chosen skill. If you have 10 or more ranks in that skill, this bonus increases to +6.
generalFeats.special: Choose one skill. This feat can be taken multiple times, but each time it applies to a different skill.

generalFeats.name: Stealthy
generalFeats.description: You get a +2 bonus on Escape Artist and Stealth skill checks.

generalFeats.name: Toughness
generalFeats.description: You gain +3 hit points. For every Hit Die you possess beyond 3, you gain an additional +1 hit point.

generalFeats.name: Two-Weapon Fighting
generalFeats.description: Your penalties on attack rolls for fighting with two weapons are reduced. The penalty for your primary hand lessens by 2 and the one for your off hand lessens by 6.

generalFeats.name: Weapon Finesse
generalFeats.description: With a light weapon, elven curve blade, rapier, whip, or spiked chain made for a creature of your size category, you may use your Dexterity modifier instead of your Strength modifier on attack rolls.

fighterBonusFeats.name: Blind-Fight
fighterBonusFeats.description: Reduces penalties for fighting while unable to see.

fighterBonusFeats.name: Combat Expertise
fighterBonusFeats.description: Trade attack bonus for AC bonus when fighting defensively.

fighterBonusFeats.name: Combat Reflexes
fighterBonusFeats.description: Make additional attacks of opportunity based on Dex modifier.

fighterBonusFeats.name: Deadly Aim
fighterBonusFeats.description: Trade attack bonus for damage bonus with ranged weapons.

fighterBonusFeats.name: Dodge
fighterBonusFeats.description: Gain +1 dodge bonus to AC against one designated opponent.

fighterBonusFeats.name: Improved Unarmed Strike
fighterBonusFeats.description: Deal lethal damage with unarmed strikes without penalty.

fighterBonusFeats.name: Point-Blank Shot
fighterBonusFeats.description: Gain +1 bonus on attack and damage rolls with ranged weapons at close range.

fighterBonusFeats.name: Power Attack
fighterBonusFeats.description: Trade attack bonus for damage bonus with melee weapons.

fighterBonusFeats.name: Quick Draw
fighterBonusFeats.description: Draw weapons as a free action.

fighterBonusFeats.name: Rapid Shot
fighterBonusFeats.description: Make one extra ranged attack per round at -2 penalty.

fighterBonusFeats.name: Shot on the Run
fighterBonusFeats.description: Move, shoot, and move again as a full-round action.

fighterBonusFeats.name: Toughness
fighterBonusFeats.description: Gain +3 hit points, +1 per HD beyond 3rd.

fighterBonusFeats.name: Two-Weapon Fighting
fighterBonusFeats.description: Reduce penalties for fighting with two weapons.

fighterBonusFeats.name: Weapon Finesse
fighterBonusFeats.description: Use Dex modifier instead of Str for attack rolls with light weapons.

fighterBonusFeats.name: Weapon Focus
fighterBonusFeats.description: Gain +1 bonus on attack rolls with one weapon type.
